title: senecio glaberrimus
intro: Senecio glaberrimus, also known as woolly groundsel, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as a natural diuretic and to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio glaberrimus include its potential to help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the digestive system. In herbal preparations, Senecio glaberrimus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
